rationale: Educ. Code §30.102 governs allocation of available school fund apportionment to the Texas Juvenile Justice Department. It does not reference or depend on the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No direct conflict exists.
quote: The Texas Juvenile Justice Department is entitled to receive the state available school fund apportionment based on the average daily attendance in the department's educational programs of students who are at least three years of age and not older than 21 years of age.
_note: No direct statutory conflict. Indirect fiscal impact on school funding may occur but does not require amendment of §30.102.
